arts.ttl: One Arsenal star ruled out of Real Madrid clash, with another in serious doubt
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid could yet see their chances of securing a historic turnaround victory over Arsenal on Wednesday boosted by the latest personnel developments in the Gunners’ squad.…

arts.ttl: Man Utd hijack top Arsenal target after shock bid
arts.sum: Man Utd hijack top Arsenal target after shock bid FootballTransfers can confirm that Man Utd are interested in top Arsenal goalkeeper target Joan Garcia .

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Garcia shock as huge Barcelona offer made
arts.sum: All the latest Arsenal transfer news in one place, including updates on Joan Garcia, Bukayo Saka and Ollie Watkins . We can also confirm that Man Utd are keen on top Arsenal goalkeeper target Joan Garcia.

arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 1-0 win vs Alaves
arts.sum: Things could be improved on, of course — he is still only 22, but Camavinga showed in just one game how good he really can be. He kept going past players at will in advanced positions, and also scored a great goal to give Real Madrid the win.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand says Arsenal have 'too much' for Real Madrid but warns of 'different' Champions League story
arts.sum: The Gunners are in a great position to reach the Champions League semi-final

arts.ttl: The clubs Kieran Tierney 'rejected' for Celtic transfer return revealed including Everton, Juventus and Leverkusen
arts.sum: Tierney will link up with Brendan Rodgers again this summer after agreeing a pre contract switch from Arsenal

arts.ttl: Declan Rice once named the former Real Madrid player whose shirt he always wore growing up
Aston Villa to beat Arsenal to Sverre Nypan signing
arts.sum: Aston Villa to beat Arsenal to Sverre Nypan signing - David Ornstein After holding talks with the likes of Arsenal and City Football Group in January, Nypan is in very advanced negotiations with Aston Villa .

arts.ttl: Who is François Letexier, the referee for the UCL second leg between Real Madrid and Arsenal
arts.sum: The Real Madrid vs Arsenal clash at the Santiago Bernabeu will be overseen by French official François Letexier with the game set to be the fifth UCL contest overseeing Real Madrid . Wednesday’s game at the Bernabeu will be first time he has refereed an Arsenal match.

arts.ttl: Luka Modric sends clear message as Swansea confirm Real Madrid legend has joined club
arts.sum: Luka Modric has made a significant investment in Swansea City and will also take on a role as co-owner of the Championship club in a major coup for the Welsh outfit
